# These are the recommended GitHub repository topics.
# Go to: repo Settings → General → Topics, and add:
#
# ai, automation, claude, copilot, developer-tools, code-generation,
# product-iteration, ai-agent, markdown, llm, claude-code,
# copilot-cli, user-testing, auto-iteration, zero-dependency
#
# Recommended repo description (for Settings → General → Description):
#   🤖 AI-driven product auto-iteration: simulate users → find issues → write code → commit. Zero dependency, pure Markdown.
#
# Social Preview Image:
#   Upload a 1280×640 image at Settings → General → Social preview
#   This shows when your repo link is shared on Twitter/Slack/Discord etc.
